title: Client Particles Emitter Lifetime Looping
description: Creates repeating particle effects that cycle between active and dormant phases. The emitter runs for the active_time duration, pauses for sleep_time, then repeats indefinitely. Perfect for ambient effects like bubbling cauldrons, flickering torches, pulsing enchantment glows, or creature breathing animations.

active_time.title: Active Time
active_time.description: The time in seconds that the emitter is active. Can be a number or Molang expression.

sleep_time.title: Sleep Time
sleep_time.description: The time in seconds that the emitter sleeps between active periods. Can be a number or Molang expression.
